description_long: This is a modern military fighter jet, characterized by its sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and swept-back wings. The aircraft is painted in a dark gray camouflage scheme, with visible markings and insignia on the tail fin and fuselage. It features a single vertical stabilizer, a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front, and multiple hardpoints under the wings loaded with external fuel tanks and ordnance. The jet is equipped with a tricycle retractable landing gear, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The engine exhaust is located at the rear, and the wings are low-mounted with noticeable dihedral and wingtip missile rails. The overall design is optimized for high-speed maneuverability and combat effectiveness.
description: A dark gray modern military fighter jet with swept-back low-mounted wings, a single vertical stabilizer, and a forward bubble canopy cockpit. It is armed with external ordnance and features retractable tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and symmetrical swept-back wings with visible underwing ordnance.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, single vertical stabilizer, and detailed landing gear and weapon mounts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust, tail structure, and the full span of the swept-back wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the external stores, landing gear, and tail markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with slight dihedral angle and wingtip missile rails.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely single-seat with clear forward visibility.
